case_title: JENSEN JIAN XIN HUANG VS. RANDY ALAN EAKIN

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EAKIN, RANDY ALAN
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, JENSEN JIAN XIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2011 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2011 BY JUDGE: DON MITCHELL. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HUANG, JENSEN JIAN XIN AS TO DEFENDANT EAKIN, RANDY ALAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-07-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT EAKIN, RANDY ALAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, JENSEN JIAN XIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EAKIN, RANDY ALAN $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
